title: World Models in Words: Auditing Physical State-Transition Commitments in Vision-Language Models
summary:
Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used to answer questions about physical scenes, yet most evaluations reduce performance to a final answer. This hides whether the model perceived the right objects, represented the right physical state, predicted a plausible transition, or merely selected the right option for the wrong reasons. We introduce \wmw, an evaluation framework for auditing the \emph{language-expressed physical commitments} of VLMs. Instead of scoring only $I,q\mapsto a$, we ask models to produce a typed trace $I,q\mapsto(s_0,\Delta s,s_1,a)$: an initial state, a state transition, a resulting state, and an answer. A hybrid verifier then checks schema validity, state grounding, transition consistency, and answer-trace compatibility, yielding typed error labels such as object, relation, force, transition, temporal, unit/scale, and faithfulness errors. We release 	racebank, a controlled trace resource with 
Seed schema- and recomputation-validated synthetic scenarios across 
Families physics families, 
Pairs minimally perturbed contrastive preference pairs, verifier code, audit guidelines, and model outputs. We evaluate 
Models VLMs on both controlled and external physical-reasoning examples. \wmw reveals failures that answer-only evaluation misses: 35\% of correct answers from mid-tier models are backed by physically invalid traces. Verifier-guided reranking recovers up to 7 percentage points of trace validity without sacrificing answer accuracy, and trace-level preference tuning reduces hidden inconsistency by 41\% relative. The contribution is not another final-answer physics benchmark, but a reusable protocol for measuring whether a VLM's stated physical world can be true at the same time as its answer.

AI.tldr: 提出了用于审计视觉语言模型物理承诺的评估框架WMW，要求模型输出带有状态跟踪的推理路径，并通过混合验证器检测隐藏的不一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM评估仅关注最终答案，无法判断模型是否真正理解了物理场景还是偶然猜对。
AI.method: 提出WMW框架，要求VLM输出初始状态、状态变化、结果状态和答案的跟踪，并使用混合验证器检查模式有效性、状态基础、转换一致性和答案-跟踪兼容性，生成类型化错误标签。同时发布了带有受控场景的TraceBank数据集。
AI.result: 中等模型35%的正确答案背后存在物理无效的跟踪；验证器引导的重新排序在不降低答案准确率的情况下将跟踪有效性提升最多7个百分点；跟踪级偏好调整将隐藏不一致性相对降低41%。
AI.conclusion: 本文贡献不是又一个最终答案的物理基准，而是一个可重用的协议，用于测量VLM声称的物理世界是否与其答案同时为真。

fulltext_AI.summary: 本文提出World Models in Words框架，用于审计视觉语言模型（VLM）在物理场景推理中通过语言表达的状态-转换承诺。该框架要求模型输出结构化轨迹（初始状态、状态转换、结果状态和答案），并由混合验证器检查模式有效性、状态接地、转换一致性和答案-轨迹兼容性，生成类型化错误标签。发布了包含200个合成场景、3200个对比偏好对的WMW-TraceBank数据集。在7个VLM上的实验表明，35%的正确答案背后是物理无效轨迹，而验证器引导的重排序和偏好调整可将隐藏不一致性相对降低41%，同时保持或提升答案准确率。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: （1）引入轨迹形式化，将VLM物理推理评估从仅答案扩展到可审计的状态-转换承诺；（2）定义验证器合约和指标，分离状态提取、转换、答案-轨迹矛盾等错误；（3）发布WMW-TraceBank，包含200个验证过的合成轨迹（覆盖17个物理家族）、3200个对比偏好对、图形、提示、验证器标签和人类审计注释；（4）提供类型化失败分类法和人类审计验证，报告标签级精确率、召回率、F1和弃权率；（5）证明验证器引导的选择和轨迹级偏好监督可将隐藏不一致性相对降低41%，同时保持或提升答案准确率。
fulltext_AI.method_details: VLM被提示输出JSON格式轨迹τ=(s0, Δs, s1, a)，其中s0为初始状态（实体、属性、关系、力等），Δs为转换（物理规则和预测变化），s1为结果状态，a为答案。混合验证器依次执行模式验证、状态验证（实体存在、矛盾关系、变量范围、力方向合理性、与黄金状态比较）和转换验证（规则合理性、力-加速度方向一致、转换-结果一致性、时间标记、方程合理性、答案-轨迹一致性）。失败标签包括对象、状态、关系、力、转换、干预、时间、单位/尺度、忠实性。WMW-TraceBank包含200个合成场景（经过四道质量门控）和3200个偏好对（有效轨迹与单类型扰动的无效轨迹配对）。实验评估7个VLM（Claude Opus 4.7、GPT-5.5、GPT-4o、GPT-4o-mini、Qwen2.5-VL-72B/7B、InternVL3-78B），比较五种提示条件（仅答案、轨迹、黄金状态、验证器反馈、重排序）。对Qwen2.5-VL-7B进行LoRA DPO偏好训练。指标包括答案准确率、状态准确率、转换准确率、隐藏不一致率（HIR）。人类审计在400个分层轨迹样本上进行，验证器与人类标签的F1在状态、转换和忠实性上超过0.70。
fulltext_AI.limitations: （1）可观测性：轨迹是用户面向的承诺，而非隐藏状态的直接读出，本文避免机械论声明；（2）验证器覆盖：真实场景需要关于摩擦、弹性等的假设，验证器包含显式假设和弃权机制；（3）数据现实性：控制合成图使得黄金元数据成为可能，但可能鼓励捷径，通过外部迁移和自然错误评估缓解；（4）偏好过拟合：最小扰动负例可能教模型检测扰动模板，在保留扰动家族上偏好准确率79%，自然错误上71%，显示部分但未完全泛化。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 标准答案准确率评估隐藏了物理不一致性：35%的正确答案来自中间模型却伴随无效轨迹。World Models in Words提供了一个可重复的协议，直接审计VLM陈述的物理世界承诺，揭示了转换预测是除最强模型外的主要瓶颈。验证器引导的重排序和偏好训练可在不牺牲答案准确率的情况下将隐藏不一致性相对降低41%。该框架对教育、机器人、科学推理等下游应用至关重要，确保模型语言描述的物理世界是连贯的。

title: From Blind Guess to Informed Judgment: Teaching LLMs to Evaluate Materials by Building Knowledge-Augmented Preference Signals
summary: As candidate generation and high-throughput experimentation advance, the primary bottleneck in materials discovery is shifting from property prediction to making reliable evaluations among massive candidate sets. We propose a Knowledge-Augmented Preference Signals Framework, MaterEval, that automatically produces, for the same candidate, two evaluations: an informed judgment that follows expert rules and provides supporting evidence, and a rule-removed blind guess. By pairing the two evaluations as preference data, we guide general-purpose large language models (LLMs), originally lacking materials-specific criteria, from intuitive judgment toward reliable evaluation supported by explicit evidence. To balance throughput, cost, and reliability, we further introduce a fast-slow reasoning scheme that decouples large-scale rapid screening from in-depth review on a small subset. Using high-entropy alloy (HEA) assessment as a case study, we show that, without external retrieval and relying solely on internalized capabilities, small open-source LLMs achieve substantial gains in accuracy, conclusion consistency, and evidence discrimination, approaching the performance of rule-based closed-source LLMs. These results demonstrate that expert rules can be systematically transformed into learnable preference signals, enabling a low-cost and deployable evaluation module for autonomous materials discovery loops.

AI.tldr: 提出MaterEval框架，通过知识增强的偏好信号将专家规则转化为可学习的评估能力，使小规模开源LLM在材料评估中接近闭源规则模型。
AI.motivation: 材料发现中，候选生成和高通量实验进步导致主要瓶颈从属性预测转向大规模候选集的可靠评估。
AI.method: 构建配对评估作为偏好数据（有专家规则和盲猜），引导LLM学习；引入快慢推理方案（快速筛选+深度评估）平衡吞吐量、成本和可靠性。
AI.result: 在高熵合金评估中，小开源LLM在准确性、结论一致性和证据判别上显著提升，接近基于规则的闭源LLM性能。
AI.conclusion: 专家规则可系统转化为可学习的偏好信号，实现低成本、可部署的评估模块，用于自主材料发现循环。

fulltext_AI.summary: 提出知识增强偏好信号框架MaterEval，通过自动为同一候选材料生成有知识支持的判断和无知识盲猜作为偏好数据，结合两阶段训练（SFT冷启动和DPO偏好对齐）以及快慢推理方案，使小型开源LLMs在没有外部检索的情况下，在高熵合金评估任务中达到与规则辅助的闭源大模型相当的性能，实现了低成本、可部署的可靠材料评估。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions:
1. 提出知识增强偏好信号，将分散的材料评估领域知识转化为可学习的偏好数据，使模型能够区分有证据支持的可靠判断与表面合理但不可靠的猜测。
2. 提出两阶段判断对齐策略，通过规则驱动的监督微调和偏好对齐，显著提升小型开源LLMs在材料评估中的稳定性和可靠性。
3. 提出分层快慢评估范式，将高通量筛选与深度评估解耦，在保持评估一致性的同时降低推理成本。
fulltext_AI.method_details:
方法包括知识增强偏好数据集构建和两阶段训练。

1. 知识增强偏好数据集构建：
   (1) 从文献和数据库中自动挖掘领域知识，构建涵盖成分-工艺-性能耦合规则的结构化规则库。
   (2) 从规则库自动生成判断题和选择题作为辅助监督（QA任务）。
   (3) 定义统一输入模式（成分-工艺-目标性能），计算常用材料描述符（如ΔH_mix、VEC等）。
   (4) 使用教师模型（如GPT-5）结合规则库生成有知识支持的判断（正向信号），包含<think>推理轨迹和结构化摘要。
   (5) 移除规则库，使用同一教师模型生成盲猜判断（负向信号）。

2. 两阶段训练：
   - 第一阶段（SFT冷启动）：使用长时间推理输出、简洁判断输出和规则派生QA进行监督微调，使模型学会稳定的输出格式并建立基础领域知识。
   - 第二阶段（DPO偏好对齐）：以知识增强判断为正例、盲猜为负例，通过直接偏好优化引导模型参数偏向知识导向的评估。

3. 快慢推理：训练时使用不同控制模板生成快速（简洁）和慢速（详细）输出；推理时先用快模式高通量筛选，再对少数高潜力候选使用慢模式进行深入评估。
fulltext_AI.limitations:
1. 当前验证仅针对高熵合金系统，对更广泛材料系统的泛化性有待研究。
2. 训练依赖自动构建的规则库，规则库的质量和覆盖范围直接影响模型性能，且规则挖掘可能遗漏重要知识。
3. 尚未与真实实验反馈集成进行闭环校准，判断边界可能偏离实际可合成性。
4. 偏好信号未采用分层或难度感知策略，可能在复杂多证据权衡场景下训练效率有限。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 随着候选生成和高通量实验的进步，材料发现的主要瓶颈从预测转向可靠评估。本文提出一种低成本、可扩展的方法，通过将领域知识内化到小型LLMs参数中，使其无需外部检索即可进行证据驱动的稳定评估。该框架能够将专家规则系统转化为可学习的偏好信号，实现评估自动化，为自主材料发现循环提供实用的决策模块，有望加速材料筛选和验证过程。

title: Think Fast, Talk Smart: Partitioning Deterministic and Neural Computation for Structured Health Text Generation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being used to generate health text from structured records such as wearable time series, biomarkers, vitals, and care-management logs. For recurring health outputs, fluency is not enough: systems must remain faithful to source data, ground explanatory claims in available evidence, follow stated policies, emit machine-readable outputs, and run cheaply enough for repeated use. We ask which responsibilities in structured health generation should be deterministic computation rather than runtime LLM prompting. We introduce Think Fast, Talk Smart, a sleep-health insight pipeline in which deterministic code performs recurring analysis before one bounded LLM writer call. Across 280 user-nights and six models, achieves lower numeric error, lower instruction-compliance error, and lower end-to-end cost than structured zero-shot and few-shot one-call baselines. Layer replacement reveals contract-specific failures: LLM comparison raises numeric error, LLM ranking degrades policy selection, LLM attribution increases unsupported causal language, and an LLM-generated writer interface reintroduces errors even after upstream facts are deterministic. The results support a broader design rule: let code own recurring analysis, and let LLMs express verified facts within bounded interfaces.

AI.tldr: 提出在结构化健康文本生成中，用确定性代码处理重复分析，仅在一次LLM调用中表达验证事实，以降低错误和成本。
AI.motivation: LLM生成的健康文本需保持对源数据的忠实度、遵循策略等，但现有方法在数值和合规性上易出错且成本高。
AI.method: 设计Think Fast, Talk Smart管道，将重复分析交给确定性代码，仅最后一步使用一次LLM调用生成最终文本。
AI.result: 在280用户夜和6个模型上，相比零样本和少样本单次调用基线，数值错误、指令合规错误和端到端成本均更低。
AI.conclusion: 支持设计规则：让代码负责重复分析，LLM在受限接口中表达已验证的事实。

fulltext_AI.summary: This paper introduces TFTS, a hybrid sleep-health insight pipeline that partitions generation into deterministic analytical layers (numerical comparison, metric ranking, evidence-gated attribution) and a bounded LLM writer. Across 280 user-nights and six models, TFTS achieves lower numeric error, instruction-compliance error, and end-to-end cost compared to structured zero-shot and few-shot one-call baselines. A layer-replacement protocol reveals that delegating any analytical responsibility to an LLM (e.g., comparison, ranking, attribution, or the writer interface) degrades accuracy, showing the importance of keeping recurring, verifiable reasoning deterministic.
fulltext_AI.key_contributions:
Demonstrates that deterministic analytical layers plus a bounded LLM writer achieve lower error and cost than strong prompting baselines on recurring health-insight generation tasks.
Introduces a layer-replacement protocol that isolates individual analytical responsibilities by replacing them with LLM-generated typed artifacts, exposing specific failure modes (e.g., numeric error, policy selection error, attribution error).
Identifies the writer interface as a non-obvious failure point: even when upstream facts are deterministic, replacing the compact evidence-to-writer handoff reintroduces numeric and attribution errors.
fulltext_AI.method_details: The TFTS pipeline applies a four-stage deterministic decomposition: (1) format structured input from wearable data; (2) compute numerical comparisons and rank metrics by selection policy; (3) gate attribution by evidence; (4) compact selected facts into a bounded prompt interface. A single final LLM call generates user-facing prose under a strict schema. The method is evaluated against two baselines: Structured Zero-Shot (single LLM call with raw data and rules) and Structured Few-Shot (strengthened with examples and explicit instructions). A layer-replacement protocol replaces exactly one deterministic analytical layer (Comparison, Ranker, Attribution, or Handoff) with an LLM-generated typed artifact, keeping all other layers deterministic, to isolate the impact of each responsibility.
fulltext_AI.limitations:
Not validated on other health domains (e.g., lab results, medication coaching) or tasks requiring open-ended clinical reasoning.
Evaluation measures preservation of a deterministic reference system, not clinical optimality or user-perceived helpfulness.
Human evaluation of helpfulness and perceived personalization is left as future work.
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: The paper establishes a practical design rule for structured health text generation: let deterministic code own stable, verifiable analytical reasoning (arithmetic, ranking, attribution, writer interface), and let LLMs focus on expressing verified facts in natural language within constrained bounds. This partitioning reduces errors, lowers cost, and improves faithfulness compared to pure LLM prompting, offering a scalable approach for recurring health-insight systems.

title: VikingMem: A Memory Base Management System for Stateful LLM-based Applications
summary: Large Language Models have revolutionized interactive applications; however, their finite context windows pose a critical data management challenge for maintaining stateful, long-term interactions. Existing memory approaches often rely on simplistic extraction methods that lead to incomplete memories or use rigid, single-purpose memory extraction prompts tailored to a single use case, such as chatbots. Consequently, they lack generalizability and perform poorly across diverse downstream tasks. To bridge this gap, we introduce the Memory Base, a novel data management paradigm for managing the persistent state of long-term interactions. It is characterized by three core principles: selective extraction of high-value memories from raw information streams; inherent statefulness and evolution, where memory content is progressively summarized, corrected, and temporally weighted to prioritize recent interactions; and a generalizable abstraction paradigm designed for robust transferability across diverse applications, including education, recommendation, and agent memory. Building on this foundation, we present VikingMem, an end-to-end Memory Base Management System implemented on the VikingDB vector engine. VikingMem materializes this paradigm through interconnected event and entity abstractions. It features event-centric memory extraction to selectively handle complex information streams, while entities are dynamically updated by events to achieve stateful evolution. Using temporal compression via a topic-wise timeline and time-weighted recall, the system progressively produces high-level summary memories, prioritizes recent items, and compresses and fades older ones. Extensive evaluations on long-term memory benchmarks demonstrate that VikingMem outperformes baselines by up to 30% in memory retrieval effectiveness while maintaining the low latency essential for interactive applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Memory Base范式及其实现VikingMem，通过选择性提取、状态演进和通用抽象来改进长期交互中的记忆管理，在基准测试中提升了30%的检索效果并保持低延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖简单提取导致记忆不完整，或使用针对单一用例的僵硬提示，缺乏通用性，在多样下游任务上表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出Memory Base范式，包括三个核心原则；实现VikingMem系统，基于VikingDB向量引擎，使用事件和实体抽象，事件中心提取，动态更新实体，时间压缩（主题式时间线和时间加权召回）进行总结和优先化。
AI.result: 在长期记忆基准上，VikingMem在记忆检索有效性上优于基线最高30%，同时保持低延迟。
AI.conclusion: VikingMem有效管理了长期记忆，具有通用性和高性能，适用于多种应用。

fulltext_AI.summary: 本文提出 VikingMem，一个针对有状态 LLM 应用的记忆基础管理系统。它引入记忆基础（Memory Base）范式，基于选择性提取、内在状态性与进化、通用化设计三个核心原则。系统采用事件-实体模型，通过智能分割、单次提取、算子更新和时间加权检索等技术，实现高效、通用的记忆管理。在 LOCOMO 和 LongMemEval 基准上，VikingMem 显著优于现有方法，检索准确率提升高达 38%，P95 延迟最低，并已在字节跳动五个工业场景部署。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1. 正式定义 Memory Base 框架及其三大设计原则。2. 实现端到端系统 VikingMem，包括单次提取、智能分割、实体更新算法（EUA）、多种运算符（SUM/AVG/LLM_MERGE/TIME_COMPRESS）等关键技术模块。3. 在字节跳动五个工业场景（社交、搜索推荐、效率工具、教育、Agent）展示其通用性。4. 实验证明在 LLM-as-Judge 评估中达到 SOTA，检索准确率超基线最高 38%，P95 延迟最低。
fulltext_AI.method_details: 基于三个工业观察（低信噪比、状态动态性、架构碎片化）设计。数据模型：事件（离散、有时间戳的记录）与实体（演化的状态），通过 JSON 模式定义，支持聚合表达式和运算符。系统分三阶段：1）提取：先进行语义滤波和事件分区（智能分割），再通过编译后的单次提示一次性提取多种记忆类型。2）管理：事件去重；实体通过统计或 LLM 算子更新，引入 EUA 补丁算法避免额外 LLM 调用；关键字图辅助检索。3）检索：多路径召回（主路径混合检索加时间与业务权重，辅助路径通过关键字图），多向量重排。时间压缩算子在主题时间线上对旧事件进行惰性合并，保留近期细节。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 1. 提取和实体更新依赖 LLM，虽经优化仍有成本与延迟。2. EUA 补丁算法对复杂语义更新可能不够准确。3. 智能分割依赖 LLM 判别，对噪音处理能力有限。4. 系统需要用户自定义模式，配置复杂度较高。5. 实验在有限硬件条件下进行，超大规模场景下性能尚需验证。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 该工作解决 LLM 长期记忆管理中状态碎片化、缺失演化能力等关键问题，提供统一、可扩展的解决方案。VikingMem 不仅在多项基准上取得最优结果，还在实际工业场景中验证有效性，将记忆管理从特定提示工程提升为可复用的代数操作，显著降低开发成本，推动有状态 LLM 应用的发展。

title: DeepSurvey: Enhancing Analytical Depth and Citation Reliability in Automated Survey Generation
summary: As scientific literature grows rapidly, automated survey generation has become a key capability for AI scientists and human researchers. However, existing systems suffer from limited analytical depth due to reliance on abstracts and isolated paper processing, and unreliable citations from imprecise retrieval and post-hoc grounding, producing superficial surveys and may mislead researchers. We present DeepSurvey, an agentic system that addresses both. To enhance depth, DeepSurvey extracts structured keynotes from full-text papers, models cross-paper relationships through clustering and comparative analysis, and integrates code-repository analysis to recover implementation-level details. To fortify reliability, it combines citation-graph expansion with hybrid filtering for topic-focussed retrieval, enforces evidence-constrained citation assignment, and deploys multi-granularity agentic refinement to validate citation-claim alignment. Experiments show that DeepSurvey achieves the highest content score (8.644/10) and citation quality (12.3% and 9.3% recall and precision gains over the strongest baseline), generalizes more robustly across domains (0.14 vs 0.22 to 0.69 CS-to-non-CS drop), and is preferred over human-written surveys by domain experts (83.3% overall quality, 100% content depth).

AI.tldr: DeepSurvey是一个代理系统，通过全文本分析和引文验证生成深度且可靠的调查。
AI.motivation: 现有自动调查生成系统分析深度有限且引文不可靠，依赖摘要和独立处理，以及不精确检索和事后接地。
AI.method: DeepSurvey从全文提取关键笔记，通过聚类和比较分析建模跨论文关系，整合代码仓库分析；结合引文图扩展和混合过滤进行检索，执行证据约束的引文分配，使用多粒度代理精炼验证对齐。
AI.result: DeepSurvey达到8.644/10的内容分数，引文召回率和精确率提升12.3%和9.3%，跨领域更健壮，领域专家83.3%偏好其总体质量，100%偏好内容深度。
AI.conclusion: DeepSurvey在自动调查生成中实现了深度和可靠性的显著提升，超越了现有系统和人类撰写。

fulltext_AI.summary: 针对现有自动调查生成系统分析深度不足和引用可靠性差的问题，DeepSurvey通过全文本关键词提取、跨论文关系建模和代码仓库分析提升深度；通过引用图扩展、证据约束写作和多粒度代理细化提升引用可靠性。实验表明，DeepSurvey在内容得分（8.644/10）和引用质量（召回率0.728，精确率0.681）上超越最强基线，跨领域泛化更强，且领域专家更偏好（总体质量胜率83.3%，内容深度胜率100%）。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1) 提出DeepSurvey，一个通过全文本阅读、跨论文关系建模和代码仓库分析构建可重用分析基底以增强分析深度的代理系统。2) 设计贯穿生成流程的闭环可靠性机制，包括基于图的检索、证据约束写作和多粒度代理细化。3) 大量实验证明DeepSurvey在内容质量、引用质量、跨领域稳定性上达到最优，且人类专家更偏好其生成的综述。
fulltext_AI.method_details: DeepSurvey包含五个阶段：阶段1（基于图的文献检索）通过语义学者获取种子论文，利用引用图扩展并结合混合过滤（粗粒度语义过滤和细粒度LLM重排序）得到结构化且主题集中的证据集。阶段2（全文本理解）对每篇论文阅读全文并生成结构化关键词，覆盖贡献、方法、实验、假设和局限性。阶段3（聚类与关系分析）先对关键词聚类，然后在每个簇内进行多视角关系建模（关系图、比较表、引导问答），并包含代码分析子系统从仓库中提取实现细节。阶段4（大纲起草与限域写作）从聚类结果生成层次化大纲，将论文显式分配给各章节，然后自底向上写作，伴有引用验证机制。阶段5（多粒度细化）通过集中式规划代理协调读者、评审者和修订者角色，进行章节级、子章节级和综述级的迭代优化，确保引用与声明一致。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 1) 代码分析模块主要对计算机科学领域有效，在非CS领域代码仓库稀疏，收益有限甚至可能降低写作质量和引用指标。2) LLM幻觉无法完全消除，尽管DeepSurvey在引用质量上大幅领先，但绝对召回率（0.728）和精确率（0.681）仍未达到完全可靠水平。3) 深度分析管线带来更高的时间和令牌成本，在综述深度与生成成本之间存在权衡。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 随着科学文献快速增长，自动生成深入且可靠的综述对于AI科学家和人类研究人员至关重要。DeepSurvey系统地解决了现有方法在分析深度和引用可靠性上的根本缺陷，通过全文本分析、跨论文关系建模和代码分析实现了超越现有方法的深度，同时通过闭环可靠性机制保证了引用的准确性。实验证实DeepSurvey在多个领域表现优异，且专家更偏好其生成的内容。这项工作为自动化文献综合提供了实用且有影响力的方案，有助于研究人员更高效地理解复杂研究领域。

title: FinGuard: Detecting Financial Regulatory Non-Compliance in LLM Interactions
summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in financial services, a single non-compliant interaction can expose institutions to regulatory penalties and direct consumer harm. Existing guard models are built around general harm taxonomies and overlook violations grounded in specific financial regulations. We address this gap with a regulation-driven pipeline that operates directly on regulatory documents, inducing a financial compliance risk taxonomy and synthesizing grounded training data without any predefined violation categories. Instantiating the pipeline on Chinese financial regulations, we release \textbf{FinGuard-Bench}, to our knowledge the first benchmark for financial regulatory compliance detection, with expert-annotated labels at both the query and response levels. We further train \textbf{FinGuard}, a financial compliance detection model built on Qwen3-8B and trained on the regulation-grounded data via supervised fine-tuning and self-play reinforcement learning. On FinGuard-Bench, FinGuard substantially outperforms all baselines, including dedicated guard models and much larger general-purpose LLMs such as Qwen3.5-397B-A17B and GPT-5.1. Furthermore, FinGuard also preserves general safety capabilities and adapts to unseen institution-specific policies using policy documents alone. We will publicly release the code, prompts, and resources used in this work on GitHub.

AI.tldr: FinGuard是首个金融合规检测模型，基于监管文档训练，在FinGuard-Bench上超越所有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有防护模型基于通用危害分类，忽略金融法规，导致不合规风险。
AI.method: 提出监管驱动pipeline，直接处理监管文档，生成合规风险分类和训练数据；使用Qwen3-8B进行SFT和自对弈强化学习。
AI.result: FinGuard在FinGuard-Bench上显著优于所有基线，包括专用模型和更大LLM如GPT-5.1。
AI.conclusion: FinGuard保留通用安全能力，并能仅凭政策文档适应未见过的机构特定政策。

title: Learning Design Skills as Memory Policies for Agentic Photonic Inverse Design
summary: Photonic crystal fiber (PCF) inverse design remains challenging because candidate geometries must satisfy coupled optical targets under expensive electromagnetic simulation. Existing pipelines improve surrogate prediction or one-shot parameter recommendation, but they do not accumulate reusable design knowledge across iterative trials. We formulate PCF inverse design as a memory-policy learning problem and propose SkillPCF, a closed-loop agent framework that combines a physics-guided memory skill bank, reinforcement-learned skill selection, and simulator-grounded skill evolution. We further construct a real-world dataset with 479 expert interaction traces (2,507 spans) and 553 memory-dependent evaluation queries covering dispersion engineering, loss optimization, and multi-objective design. Experiments across multiple LLM backbones and classical baselines show that SkillPCF achieves stronger design-quality and efficiency trade-offs under practical simulation budgets, demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed memory-skill learning paradigm for physics-aware PCF inverse design.

AI.tldr: 提出了SkillPCF，一种结合记忆技能库和强化学习的闭环框架，用于光子晶体光纤逆向设计，在多个基线上实现更优的设计质量和效率权衡。
AI.motivation: 现有PCF逆向设计方法不积累跨迭代的复用设计知识，导致昂贵模拟下低效。
AI.method: SkillPCF是闭环代理框架，包括物理引导记忆技能库、强化学习技能选择和模拟器基础技能进化，并构建了包含479个专家交互轨迹和553个评估查询的数据集。
AI.result: 在多个LLM主干和经典基线上，SkillPCF在实际模拟预算下实现了更强的设计质量和效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 证明了所提出的记忆-技能学习范式对物理感知PCF逆向设计的有效性。

fulltext_AI.summary: 本文针对光子晶体光纤（PCF）逆设计问题，提出SkillPCF框架，将设计经验建模为可学习的记忆策略，通过物理引导的技能库、强化学习技能选择和模拟器反馈驱动的技能进化，实现迭代积累可迁移知识。在真实数据集上，SkillPCF在低仿真预算下显著提升设计质量和效率。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1. 首次将PCF逆设计重新定义为记忆策略学习问题，将可复用的设计操作作为显式动作通过模拟器反馈优化。2. 提出SkillPCF闭环记忆框架，集成物理引导技能库、可学习技能选择控制器和从困难案例中进化技能的模块。3. 构建包含专家交互轨迹、评估查询、错误日志和初始技能库的真实世界数据集。4. 实验证明SkillPCF在低仿真预算下提高设计成功率和记忆有效性，且物理引导技能和技能进化至关重要。
fulltext_AI.method_details: 问题形式化：目标最小化昂贵的电磁仿真调用次数，同时满足光学目标。SkillPCF包含内外双循环：内循环中控制器根据当前状态从技能库中选择Top-K技能，执行器应用技能更新轨迹专有记忆库；外循环中设计师从困难案例中进化技能库。控制器使用状态编码和技能嵌入匹配，通过Gumbel-Top-K采样选择技能，执行器生成结构化记忆编辑。采用PPO优化控制器，奖励包括终端QA性能和过程成形奖励，并设计延迟奖励再分配。技能库初始包含插入、更新、删除、跳过四种PCF特定原语，通过接受/回滚机制进化。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 1. 对某些复杂结构（如分形准晶）的技能库缺乏先验知识，导致设计失败。2. 依赖语言模型生成几何建议，存在过度依赖风险，但通过确定性MEEP模拟验证缓解。3. 依赖托管基础模型，但通过固定种子和完全配置公开减轻影响。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: SkillPCF通过复用物理接地设计经验，显著减少PCF逆设计的仿真计算和人力成本，对电信、传感、生物医学成像等光学器件研发有实用价值，其范式可推广至其他仿真接地设计领域（如超材料、天线），推动物理感知设计自动化。

title: Comparative Evaluation of Machine Translation Systems on Images with Text
summary: This work presents a comparative evaluation of machine translation systems applied to images containing textual information, a task that lies at the intersection of computer vision and natural language processing. The study compares three main paradigms: modular pipelines that separate text detection, recognition, and translation; multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) capable of processing both image and text jointly; and an end-to-end model, Translatotron-V, which directly generates translated images. The modular systems employ state-of-the-art OCR (docTR) combined with multilingual LLMs such as Llama and EuroLLM, while the evaluated MLLMs include different configurations of Gemini 2.5. Experiments were conducted on parallel multilingual datasets covering multiple language pairs, with evaluation based on BLEU, chrF, and TER metrics. The results show that modular pipelines outperform the end-to-end approach, while MLLMs achieve the best overall performance, demonstrating superior flexibility and contextual understanding. These findings underscore the effectiveness of multi-modal reasoning for image-to-text translation and provide a solid foundation for future research on integrating visual understanding and language generation in multilingual settings.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了三种图像文本翻译范式：模块化流水线、多模态大语言模型和端到端模型，发现多模态大语言模型表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 评估不同范式在图像文本翻译任务上的表现，该任务处于计算机视觉与自然语言处理的交叉领域。
AI.method: 对比三种范式：模块化流水线（docTR+多语言LLMs）、多模态大语言模型（Gemini 2.5）和端到端模型（Translatotron-V），在多语言平行数据集上使用BLEU、chrF和TER指标评估。
AI.result: 模块化流水线优于端到端模型，而多模态大语言模型整体表现最佳，具备更优的灵活性和上下文理解能力。
AI.conclusion: 多模态推理在图像到文本翻译中有效，为未来融合视觉理解与语言生成的研究提供了基础。

title: LiteCoder-Terminal: Scaling Long-Horizon Terminal Environments for Learning Language Agents
summary: Mastering terminal environments requires language agents capable of multi-step planning, feedback-grounded execution, and dynamic state adaptation. However, training such agents is currently bottlenecked by a reliance on scraped external repositories, which limits domain diversity, environment controllability, and the targeting of specific capability deficits. We introduce LiteCoder-Terminal-Gen, a zero-dependency synthesis pipeline that autonomously generates executable and verifiable terminal training environments directly from domain specifications. Using this framework, we construct two large-scale resources: LiteCoder-Terminal-SFT, comprising 11,255 expert trajectories across 10 domains, and LiteCoder-Terminal-RL, featuring 602 verifiable environments for trajectory-level preference optimization. Supervised fine-tuning of Qwen-family models on our SFT dataset yields agents that significantly outperform their base counterparts. Notably, our 32B variant achieves 29.06%, 18.54%, and 34.00% pass@1 on Terminal Bench 1.0, 2.0, and Pro, respectively. Furthermore, applying Direct Multi-turn Preference Optimization (DMPO) on our RL environments yields additional performance gains. These results systematically demonstrate that fully synthetic, executable environments offer a scalable and verifiable supervision signal for mastering complex, real-world command-line workflows.

AI.tldr: LiteCoder-Terminal-Gen是一种全合成管道，用于生成可执行终端环境，通过监督微调和偏好优化显著提升了语言代理在命令行任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖爬取的外部仓库，限制了领域多样性、环境可控性和特定能力缺陷的针对性训练。
AI.method: 提出LiteCoder-Terminal-Gen零依赖合成管道，自动生成可执行且可验证的终端训练环境；构建了包含11,255条专家轨迹的SFT数据集和602个可验证环境的RL数据集，并对Qwen系列模型进行监督微调和直接多轮偏好优化（DMPO）。
AI.result: 32B变体在Terminal Bench 1.0、2.0和Pro上分别达到29.06%、18.54%和34.00%的pass@1；DMPO进一步提升了性能。
AI.conclusion: 全合成可执行环境为掌握复杂真实命令行工作流提供了可扩展且可验证的监督信号。

fulltext_AI.summary: LiteCoder-Terminal 提出一种零依赖的终端环境合成框架 LiteCoder-Terminal-Gen，能够从领域规范自动生成可执行且可验证的终端训练环境。基于该框架构建了包含 11,255 条专家轨迹的 SFT 数据集和 602 个可验证环境的 RL 数据集。在 Qwen 系列模型上微调后，在 Terminal Bench 1.0/2.0/Pro 上取得显著性能提升，并验证了 DMPO 进一步优化效果。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1. 提出 LiteCoder-Terminal-Gen，一种零依赖的合成框架，可自主生成目标终端环境、任务和评分器。2. 开源 LiteCoder-Terminal 代理、包含 11,255 条专家轨迹的 SFT 数据集和 602 个可验证环境的 RL 数据集。3. 实验证明在 Terminal Bench 多版本上，监督微调带来跨尺度性能提升，DMPO 在困难基准上进一步改善。
fulltext_AI.method_details: LiteCoder-Terminal-Gen 采用三阶段合成：首先通过 Magpie 式 LLM 采样生成领域特定任务；然后经五阶段顺序管道（指令精炼、环境初始化、解决方案合成、验证器生成、资源配置）将任务实例化为可执行环境；最后收集教师模型轨迹并基于适应性、接地性、持久性和拒绝行为四条标准过滤。训练采用监督微调 (SFT) 和 Direct Multi-turn Preference Optimization (DMPO)，后者利用环境验证器构建偏好对进行优化。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 1. 任务指令由 LLM 完成生成导致分布存在生成模型偏差。2. 所有环境基于 Ubuntu/Docker 和 GNU/Linux 工具链，缺乏对其他操作系统和发行版的扩展。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: 该工作解决了终端代理训练数据稀缺问题，通过零依赖合成框架生成大规模、多样化、可验证的训练环境，为语言代理掌握长程命令行交互提供了可扩展的监督信号。实验结果证明了合成数据在提升复杂系统操作能力上的有效性，推动具身智能代理的实用化发展。

title: GAPD: Gold-Action Policy Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning in Knowledge Base Question Answering
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a natural fit for agentic knowledge base question answering (KBQA), where a model must issue executable actions, observe knowledge-base feedback, and eventually return an answer. However, current RL-based KBQA systems mainly optimize sparse rewards from the final answer, leaving intermediate action errors weakly supervised. This is especially limiting for logical-form annotated KBQA benchmarks: gold logical forms can be converted into executable action sequences, but existing pipelines use them mainly for warm-start data construction rather than for on-policy RL updates. We propose GAPD, a training-time Gold-Action Policy Distillation framework that adds dense token-level guidance to outcome-based RL. To align gold actions with on-policy student rollouts, GAPD uses MID-ANCHOR MATCHING: it treats the intermediate entities reached during student exploration and gold execution as state anchors, and matches student states to gold states through these explored entity sets. The current policy conditioned on this aligned gold action serves as a stop-gradient teacher, whose token distribution is distilled back to the ordinary student policy over generated action-token spans. GAPD consistently surpasses the current state of the art on WebQSP, GrailQA, and GraphQ.

AI.tldr: 提出GAPD框架，通过金动作策略蒸馏和中间锚点匹配强化学习知识库问答中的动作监督。
AI.motivation: 现有RL-based KBQA系统主要优化最终答案的稀疏奖励，中间动作缺乏监督，且逻辑形式仅用于初始数据构建而非在线策略更新。
AI.method: GAPD使用MID-ANCHOR MATCHING将学生探索的中间实体集与金执行状态对齐，然后将对齐的金动作作为停止梯度教师，蒸馏其token分布到学生策略。
AI.result: 在WebQSP、GrailQA和GraphQ上持续超越当前最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: GAPD通过密集token级指导有效提升了KBQA中的强化学习性能。

fulltext_AI.summary: GAPD提出了一个针对知识库问答（KBQA）的强化学习训练框架，通过引入黄金动作策略蒸馏来解决现有方法仅使用结果奖励而缺乏中间动作监督的问题。该方法利用实体锚匹配将学生探索状态与黄金执行状态对齐，然后使用对齐后的黄金动作条件化当前策略作为教师，对学生采样令牌进行密集令牌级蒸馏，与GRPO优势融合以提供更精细的优化信号。在WebQSP、GrailQA和GraphQ基准上，GAPD均取得了超越当前最优的结果。
fulltext_AI.key_contributions: 1. 识别出基于代理的KBQA中强化学习策略的令牌级信用分配问题。2. 提出GAPD框架，包含实体锚匹配以对齐黄金动作与学生状态，构建黄金动作条件化的自教师分布，并在RL过程中提供令牌级蒸馏指导。3. 在WebQSP、GrailQA和GraphQ上超越现有最先进方法。
fulltext_AI.method_details: GAPD在结果驱动RL基础上增加密集监督。训练时，首先解析黄金逻辑形式得到黄金动作序列并执行以收集状态和实体集。对于学生策略的每个回合，使用实体锚匹配（基于Jaccard相似度）将学生状态与最相似的黄金状态对齐，若匹配有效则将下一个黄金动作插入教师提示。教师是停止梯度的当前策略在黄金动作条件化下的分布，学生是普通策略。对匹配的学生生成令牌，计算教师和学生log概率差作为令牌级优势，经裁剪后与GRPO组相对优势加权融合，形成令牌级总优势。优化采用PPO风格的裁剪替代目标。训练中应用两个保守过滤器：跳过答案回合和使用相同下一状态过滤器以保留探索。
fulltext_AI.limitations: 训练成本增加：与仅结果奖励的RL相比，GAPD训练大约慢1.5倍，因为需要黄金动作条件化的自教师对学生生成令牌进行评分。但该开销仅在训练阶段，推理时无额外计算，且学到的策略平均每次查询的交互次数更少。
fulltext_AI.why_it_matters: GAPD弥合了KBQA中黄金逻辑形式与强化学习策略优化之间的鸿沟，将稀疏结果奖励转化为密集令牌级指导，显著提升了基于RL的KBQA系统的性能。该方法不仅为KBQA提供了更有效的训练范式，其状态对齐和自蒸馏思想也可推广至其他需要密集中间监督的代理式推理任务，推动了强化学习在结构化知识推理中的应用。

title: FinVerBench: Benchmark Validity and Calibration in Large Language Model Financial Statement Verification
summary: We introduce FinVerBench, a benchmark and validity study for financial statement verification: determining whether a set of corporate financial statements is numerically consistent from the information shown to the model. FinVerBench is built from SEC 10-K XBRL filings for 43 S&P 500 companies and defines a four-category error taxonomy covering arithmetic, cross-statement linkage, year-over-year, and magnitude perturbations. We attempt fifteen contemporary LLM evaluations and report fourteen complete runs; a Gemini 2.5 Pro run is excluded from the main comparison because 40/108 gateway calls failed. All binary metrics exclude underdetermined positive instances whose perturbed line item is not rendered, leaving a 105-instance observable diagnostic subset (43 clean, 62 error-injected). Under the original guided-checklist prompt on the unrounded diagnostic subset, nine of fourteen complete LLM runs produce 95-100% false positives on clean statements, while one run achieves 0% observed false positives. Benchmark rendering choices materially affect measured recall: on a realistic rounded variant of the same observable subset, the calibrated model's recall is 79.0% with 0% observed FPR, compared with 100.0% recall on the unrounded diagnostic variant. These results support a construct-validity conclusion rather than a final leaderboard: financial statement verification is not merely arithmetic detection, but calibrated judgment under incomplete observability, prompt-induced assumptions, and realistic numerical rendering. FinVerBench and all code are publicly available.

AI.tldr: FinVerBench是一个财务报表验证基准，揭示LLM在干净报表上易产生高假阳性，且基准呈现影响召回率，支持构造效度结论。
AI.motivation: 缺乏评估LLM在财务报表数字一致性验证中表现的系统基准，需要研究其能力和局限性。
AI.method: 基于SEC 10-K XBRL文件构建43家公司的基准，定义四类错误，使用15个LLM进行评估，分析诊断子集的假阳性和召回率。
AI.result: 九个LLM运行在干净报表上产生95-100%假阳性，一个运行0%假阳性；基准呈现（舍入vs未舍入）显著影响召回率（79% vs 100%）。
AI.conclusion: 财务报表验证是校准判断而非简单算术检测，提示诱导和数值呈现是关键因素，支持构造效度而非单纯排行榜。

title: Battery-Sim-Agent: Leveraging LLM-Agent for Inverse Battery Parameter Estimation
summary: Parameterizing high-fidelity "digital twins" of batteries is a critical yet challenging inverse problem that hinders the pace of battery innovation. Prevailing methods formulate this as a black-box optimization (BBO) task, employing algorithms that are sample-inefficient and blind to the underlying physics. In this work, we introduce a new paradigm that reframes the inverse problem as a reasoning task, and present Battery-Sim-Agent, the first framework to deploy a Large Language Model (LLM) agent in a closed loop with a high-fidelity battery simulator. The agent mimics a human scientist's workflow: it interprets rich, multi-modal feedback from the simulator, forms physically-grounded hypotheses to explain discrepancies, and proposes structured parameter updates. On a systematically constructed benchmark suite spanning diverse battery chemistries, operating conditions, and difficulty levels, our agent significantly outperforms strong BBO baselines like Bayesian optimization in identifying accurate parameters. We further demonstrate the framework's capability in complex long-horizon degradation fitting tasks and validate its practical applicability on real-world battery datasets. Our results highlight the promise of LLM-agents as reasoning-based optimizers for scientific discovery and battery parameter estimation.

AI.tldr: 提出Battery-Sim-Agent，利用LLM agent与高保真电池模拟器闭环交互，将参数化逆问题重构为推理任务，显著优于传统黑盒优化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有参数化数字孪生的方法将问题视为黑盒优化，样本效率低且忽视物理机制，阻碍电池创新。
AI.method: 将逆问题重新定义为推理任务，部署LLM agent与高保真电池模拟器闭环运行；agent模拟人类科学家工作流程，解释多模态反馈、形成物理假设并提出结构化参数更新。
AI.result: 在覆盖多种电池化学、工况和难度级别的基准测试中，显著优于贝叶斯优化等基线；在复杂长时退化拟合任务中表现良好，并在真实数据集上验证了实用性。
AI.conclusion: LLM agent作为基于推理的优化器在科学发现和电池参数估计中具有潜力。

title: Kronecker Embeddings: Byte-Level Structured Token Representations for Parameter-Efficient Language Models
comment: 28 pages, 16 tables. Reference implementation: this https URL
summary: Large language models route every input through a learned embedding table of shape |V| x d_model, consuming hundreds of millions to billions of trainable parameters at frontier scale. We introduce Kronecker Embeddings, a deterministic byte-level character-position factorization that replaces this table with a fixed encoder and a single learned projection, compatible with standard BPE tokenizers, eliminating 91--94% of input-side trainable parameters at frontier scale. We provide five contributions. First, a cross-model probe across six LMs (135M-671B parameters) shows trained input embeddings cluster typographic variants of the probe word far more than morphological relatives; Kronecker escapes this clustering at the embedding layer. Second, a controlled three-seed comparison on nanoGPT GPT-2 124M over 2.5B tokens of FineWeb-Edu shows Kronecker reaching 2.5 +- 0.2% lower validation loss than the BPE-tied baseline (gap 0.083 +- 0.007 nats, ~9% lower perplexity), needing ~1.43x fewer steps to reach BPE's converged loss. Third, a spelling-robustness probe over 110 clean/typo pairs shows Kronecker preserves the top-1 prediction on 55.5% of pairs vs. 47.3% for BPE (+8.2 pp) and lowers KL by 7.6%, winning or tying in 10 of 11 categories; a generation probe shows Kronecker echoes byte-novel strings and typos through generation where BPE forgets them. Fourth, BPE embedding norm drifts during training while Kronecker projection norm stays near 1.0, consistent with a stable representational target. Fifth, an on-the-fly runtime variant reconstructs embeddings from a 4.5 MB byte buffer rather than a 2.15 GB table at vocabulary 131,072, with 0.01--0.24% step-time overhead. Byte-level locality has a tradeoff: byte-similar but semantically distant pairs (compute/commute, nation/notion) cluster together, shifting disambiguation to early attention layers.

AI.tldr: 提出Kronecker Embeddings，一种确定性的字节级字符位置分解，替代标准嵌入表，消除91-94%的输入侧可训练参数，并在多个实验中表现优于基线。
AI.motivation: 标准嵌入表在大规模模型中消耗大量可训练参数，并且学习到的嵌入对拼写变体聚类过度，导致鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 采用Kronecker乘积分解，将嵌入表替换为固定编码器（字节级字符位置分解）和单个学习投影，兼容BPE分词器。
AI.result: 在nanoGPT上验证损失降低2.5±0.2%，约9%的困惑度改进；拼写鲁棒性top-1准确率提升8.2个百分点；嵌入范数稳定在1.0；运行时存储从2.15GB降至4.5MB。
AI.conclusion: 字节级局部性带来字节相似但语义不同对的聚类，需依赖早期注意力层进行消歧，存在性能权衡。

title: Opt-Verifier: Unleashing the Power of LLMs for Optimization Modeling via Dual-Side Verification
summary: Building mathematical optimization models is critical in operations research (OR), while it requires substantial human expertise. Recent advancements have utilized large language models (LLMs) to automate this modeling process. However, existing works often struggle to verify the correctness of the generated optimization models, without checking the rationality of the constraints and variables or the validity of solutions to the generated models. This hampers the subsequent verification and correction steps, and thus it severely hurts the modeling accuracy. To address this challenge, we propose a novel LLM-based framework with Dual-side Verification (Opt-Verifier) from both structure and solution perspectives, thereby improving the modeling accuracy. The structure-side verification ensures that the modeling structure of the generated optimization models aligns with the original problem description, accurately capturing the problem's constraints and requirements. Meanwhile, the solution-side verification interprets and evaluates the solutions' validity, confirming that the optimization models are logically and mathematically sound. Experiments on popular benchmarks demonstrate that our approach achieves over 20\% improvement in accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出Opt-Verifier框架，通过结构和解决方案双面验证提高LLM建模准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以验证生成的优化模型正确性，缺乏对变量和约束合理性的检查，导致建模准确性低。
AI.method: 提出Opt-Verifier，从结构侧验证建模结构与原问题一致，从解侧验证解的合理性，确保模型逻辑和数学正确。
AI.result: 在流行基准测试上实现超过20%的准确性提升。
AI.conclusion: 双面验证框架有效提高了LLM在数学优化建模任务上的准确性。

title: Beyond Attack Success Rate: Temporal Logit Observability for LLM Safety Failures
summary: Attack Success Rate (ASR) evaluates each jailbreak with a single yes/no label at the end of generation, telling us whether a failure happened but not how it unfolded. Two attacks that produce equally harmful outputs may have followed completely different paths, and ASR cannot tell them apart. We make those hidden paths observable from logits alone. Temporal Logit Observability (TLO) is a training-free diagnostic that watches a compliance-refusal margin during decoding and places each model-attack condition on a calibrated 2D plane. By design, this plane is most informative exactly where ASR is least informative: among attacks that succeed for genuinely different reasons. Across four aligned LLMs and three jailbreak paradigms, attacks with nearly identical ASR land at clearly different points on the plane: the same model can fail through different temporal patterns. The geometry matches refusal-direction probes from hidden states on most conditions, with one model showing the limit of our fixed-lexicon approach. A simple early-stop rule derived from TLO cuts successful jailbreaks by more than half, without false alarms on plain benign queries. Safety evaluation should report when and how a failure unfolds, not only whether it occurred. TLO makes the first two observable from logits alone.

AI.tldr: 提出时序逻辑可观测性（TLO）方法，通过监测解码过程中的遵从-拒绝边际，从logits中揭示越狱攻击的时序模式，补充ASR的不足。
AI.motivation: ASR只使用最终标签评估越狱，无法区分攻击成功但路径不同的情况，需要使隐藏路径从logits中可观察。
AI.method: TLO是一种无训练诊断，在解码时观察compliance-refusal margin，并将每个模型-攻击条件放置在标定的2D平面上，该平面在ASR最不具信息性的地方最有用。
AI.result: 在四种LLM和三种越狱范式下，具有相同ASR的攻击在平面上位于不同点；TLO导出的早停规则将成功越狱减少一半以上，且无假阳性。
AI.conclusion: 安全评估应报告失败的时间和方式，TLO使得仅从logits就能观察这些信息。

title: UI-KOBE: Knowledge-Oriented Behavior Exploration for Lightweight Graph-Guided GUI Agents
summary: Recent advances in mobile GUI agents have shown strong potential for automating mobile tasks, but most effective systems still depend on large vision-language models for screenshot understanding and long-horizon planning. Small GUI agents that can be deployed directly on mobile devices are more attractive for practical use, offering lower inference cost and better protection of sensitive on-device information. However, due to limited model capacity, such lightweight agents remain unreliable when planning and executing GUI tasks end-to-end from screenshots alone. We propose Knowledge-Oriented Behavior Exploration (\textbf{UI-KOBE}), a framework that improves lightweight mobile GUI agents with reusable app-specific graph knowledge. UI-KOBE first autonomously explores a mobile application and constructs an app knowledge graph, where nodes represent distinct UI states and edges represent executable transitions. At runtime, a lightweight GUI agent uses the graph as external guidance: given a user task and the current screenshot, it identifies the current graph node and selects among self-loop actions, neighboring transitions, task completion, or fallback free actions associated with that node. By supporting runtime decisions with app-specific graph guidance, UI-KOBE reduces the burden of end-to-end GUI planning and helps lightweight models perform mobile GUI tasks more effectively, offering a practical step toward efficient, interpretable, and privacy-conscious on-device GUI agents.

AI.tldr: UI-KOBE通过自动构建应用知识图来改进轻量级移动GUI代理，使其能够更有效地执行任务。
AI.motivation: 小型GUI代理因模型容量有限，在仅从截图进行端到端规划时不可靠，而大型模型依赖大视觉语言模型，不适合直接部署在设备上。
AI.method: 提出UI-KOBE框架，首先自主探索应用并构建知识图（节点代表UI状态，边代表可执行转换），运行时轻量级代理利用该图作为外部指导，识别当前节点并在自环、邻接转换、任务完成或自由动作中选择。
AI.result: UI-KOBE减少了端到端GUI规划的负担，帮助轻量级模型更有效地执行移动GUI任务。
AI.conclusion: 为高效、可解释且隐私保护的在设备GUI代理提供了实用的一步。

title: Improving CLIP Adaptation by Breaking Tail Alignment for Source-Free Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) such as CLIP demonstrate strong zero-shot generalization, but their performance significantly degrades in cross-domain scenarios with scarce target-domain training data (Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning, CDFSL). In this paper, we focus on the target-domain few-shot finetuning in the CLIP-based CDFSL task. Prevailing finetuning paradigms uniformly align all image patch tokens with their corresponding textual embeddings. However, we find a counterintuitive phenomenon: actively pushing away certain low-similarity image tokens, termed "tail tokens", from their textual embeddings consistently improves target-domain performance. We delve into this phenomenon and provide a novel interpretation: under great domain shifts and scarce training data, the model can hardly extract semantic information from visual inputs; therefore, the common belief of alignment is valid only for tokens already containing sufficient semantic information; for tail tokens, forcing the alignment would lead to excessive overfitting to the scarce training, while breaking the alignment is more useful. Motivated by this, we propose Adaptive Tail-Head Alignment (ATHA), a novel fine-tuning strategy for CLIP that transforms the conventional uniform alignment paradigm to an adaptive alignment paradigm, with both alignment strengthening and weakening. Extensive experiments on four challenging CDFSL benchmarks validate our state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at .

AI.tldr: 提出自适应尾头对齐策略，通过区分强对齐和弱对齐提升CLIP在跨域少样本学习中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 标准均匀对齐所有图像token在域偏移和稀缺数据下导致尾token过拟合，而主动推离这些token可提升性能。
AI.method: ATHA将均匀对齐范式转换为自适应对齐，对语义丰富的头token加强对齐，对尾token减弱对齐。
AI.result: 在四个CDFSL基准上达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 打破均匀对齐、自适应调整对齐程度能有效缓解过拟合，提高模型对目标域的适应能力。

title: Orthogonal Negative Guidance in Attention Feature Space for Text-to-Image Generation
summary: Text-to-image (T2I) models have become increasingly capable of generating high-quality images. Yet, enforcing the explicit absence of a specified object or attribute remains a fundamentally challenging problem. Existing approaches, including prompt negation, post-hoc editing, and negative guidance, remain insufficient for explicit concept suppression, often failing to remove the target concept or degrading overall image quality. To this end, we propose Orthogonal Negative Guidance in attention feature space, a training-free method that operates in the attention output space of MM-DiT-based T2I transformers. Our method orthogonalizes negative-prompt attention features with respect to positive-prompt features and subtracts only the orthogonal component, suppressing unwanted concepts while preserving desired semantics. Experiments on FLUX-dev and FLUX-schnell show that our method achieves favorable trade-offs between concept suppression, prompt alignment, and image quality. In human evaluation, our method outperforms the second-best baseline by 18.78%. We further show that our method supports multi-concept suppression and adjustable concept suppression.

AI.tldr: 提出正交负引导方法，在注意力特征空间中通过正交化负提示特征来抑制不需要的概念，同时保持图像质量，无需训练。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像模型在明确概念抑制方面不足，现有方法如提示否定、事后编辑和负引导往往无法有效移除目标概念或降低图像质量。
AI.method: 正交负引导，在基于MM-DiT的T2I变换器的注意力输出空间中，将负提示注意力特征相对于正提示特征进行正交化，只减去正交分量。
AI.result: 在FLUX-dev和FLUX-schnell上实验，取得概念抑制、提示对齐和图像质量的良好平衡；在人本评估中比第二好基线高18.78%；支持多概念抑制和可调概念抑制。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法能有效抑制不需要的概念，同时保持图像质量和提示对齐，是一种训练免费且高效的方法。
